name: James Carville
subject: Scared to death
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Is Trumpism winning? | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOYnAfKGLZE1uIISL6ANX2g32g7LxSqNertvOva_O9ZBMW0tIv7FyEgwaTDwYGxlKdNaOsWHI1W3zbG77-dwdkhkxJGT088SX_2Txow3rY6r8z32SZQ5raWBQQblEq-I-D0gJVc-LEgkVQ64DS3b5WEryUN0Ae3lc8Kv8-QHA9rxzWCuXfP1dS5OW0FcnooLdZASLmuwOZ4QrhWhjC4HGC25FHr963zYS3XSxzdMflscAiWzYBmZRZzf13cRHOCNPUzRKIiK1Kjb87x2aqFbaW7w/3am/8zXMBCJfS1eeao_7tmrUPQ/h0/HYrHig2mO-VrJFPAIoiJUEgjePL0Qz-nTO18lflLZvQ)
Derek,
I’ve sounded the alarm before about self-proclaimed “Trump in heels” Amanda Chase. But here’s an important update: **Chase is leading in the polls, and I’m scared to death.** We’ve got to get behind Terry right now to stop her. **[Will you donate right now to help my friend Terry McAuliffe stop Amanda Chase?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOYnAfKGLZE1uIISL6ANX2g2UBJKIA48uo6Cj_8wu5jZe6aTDw_PU4lTQJ3dFgA2ota9aKwYc7nRlivUcrqyWT8lrFVzt7ag4eSggzVXf3tw-MXuws2qEKaJRAwm0QqTzVCooJP2MThWbdlxzRt8wezXTEqa0n95TSqAch0K8sOtvJWe8P_LFp53WFSiyu3SbGml1Qe6XMHfarWclJemEmmd5Dbm6SEgclY2Y-_xs_6MkejrENUYaMHuKGqt87QZGDplk-aP7Yj8xpzQYGuVB8qg/3am/8zXMBCJfS1eeao_7tmrUPQ/h1/S6EuKeJF2MMG4GH-6IG531Ab85uuDQpGQCmQOh0wLfA)** She says it herself, she’s “Trump in heels.” Doesn’t believe in science, spews racism and hate, and spreads conspiracy theories that undermine our democracy. We’ve got to stop her, Derek, and the best way to do that is by electing Terry McAuliffe. Now I’ve worked side-by-side with Terry for years, and I know he’s the right person for the job -- but he needs help from you. It isn’t easy to run a campaign, take it from me. It takes an army of grassroots supporters, and **we’re gonna need you to pitch in to help Terry take on Chase.** | [**Pitch in $20 »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOYnAfKGLZE1uIISL6ANX2g2-xMqcRRrQcW1wr3H6nCs8Z1_3Dsgrke21blYV9_dHe1l0rQLL0_fBqBtaOmSrER3RaGtvdukVzCM_kiSEqWbDlMhWoeOQJzlSox3g9NATZwWC3GThTCvnIRJSuknJzNVP2Vh05EJ0706BtficV21TMyfqVcXW-N-xaKyg60WnxDlLFatsamyOkDCmM2eeQFu29nq3_YBTpbO2bPfCXjoUkIqS4YC4LOaQaPcwgz4UF7BJmOujRWfEWF932hT54tc/3am/8zXMBCJfS1eeao_7tmrUPQ/h2/vSJ31_9i9Z_H74n2kEsLu6C1G7H8Qw6owRfPQ9CaPok)
---
Trumpism is threatening to make a return in Virginia, and Derek, if we don’t stop it here, it’s going to spread like wildfire across the country. We can’t let that happen. **[Join me and Terry in fighting Trumpism in Virginia.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOYnAfKGLZE1uIISL6ANX2g1WWvjUePPNbYTs_h1MCJTf23WQkaQ1ES4Z-9A1KQTSlraqMHJ0NTx3rTyZgdoFMvK86MVi-_BxtUOQant-5C0ysFivn8vRL-y1XURs8grARojotFKjJ3MIn8YE1xpNp9gVKxj8D_Mvbu3LbtL1D0b1yeWl4Ya6Mpv48oafcikB-4i7rGYi9-ukxaZgrZLhTKOk38VA5AFrYSf4RJ-vKCPv14SqJgZs3Aav2quef5H7QoAsQTTw9fNa7JWPbLAp93k/3am/8zXMBCJfS1eeao_7tmrUPQ/h3/epNAGXPcqCa_U1C-y0e9rXpVhrB--sS62MXQHBW-1cY)**
I’ve also seen Republicans grow stronger, meaner, and more reckless in their politics and hate these past four years. We all have.
It’s time to end this awful chapter in our nation’s history for good.
Thank you,
James Carville

[**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOYnAfKGLZE1uIISL6ANX2g1jQPtgeLeXZS8kpgleFQIv-Um_CW_T2Pz6FBEJVVFit-MQG4vyjFBVJzBXZ3NCfO8XoT5wFLQH3SZFX2kih2VLuQhvG2vg_QKby8K56ads0a_rBriYZOO8LIuKTdyl70cLjJTvv1qQx17lgrXuFv22E0Sw4WgqPZPkOIiDxO7bYFfAd-5NKoXMmH48wp2z-Vd7FTt7bBKuE_ADQ8aCFgvebrCxq-lLlrxICLu9f_t4EKEPP-ZWmoBd9BW23ivVkr8/3am/8zXMBCJfS1eeao_7tmrUPQ/h4/4U74di3S-PlrLaZkOqo0gmq1Zqwh_K1D3oAYFeluwU8)

name: Citizens for Turner
subject: Video From Congressman Mike Turner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Turner
body:
| I wanted to share with you all the video below from Congressman Mike Turner (OH-10).

I’m sure you were as surprised as I was when Senator Portman announced he would not seek re-election in 2022, and Mike has been very humbled and grateful to all of those who have reached out and encouraged him to look at running for this seat.

As Mike continues to consider a run, we’d like to hear from you on what we need from our next senator.
---
| [](https://trk1.mindfireinc.com/?ref=USYAAHNk9KEWrogFS4fb895C_skL9N9fAQAAAHkY4omFp2rdoLfMs0siKHiCGiXpNenZOwUze11d0kO1iPFe-gU6GSqg_bzJNiywMrgCG2EjetyrczAhcjPksH8Lf5o1aggK_lDSQ4eLPli4c8lFarPcerDy7S9yj3NnViK186y4Cs9-v9YeyihJn3nQvuJQeSxYefN6-rAfAfBNzgquIYCcQTL72ZPz-Z1l9djMU3rAdstBdTiKFg2_Utc)
---
Please feel free to forward this email to your friends and family. I look forward to hearing from you and hopefully we will see you soon.

Frank

**Frank DeBrosse**
Citizens For Turner
937-232-6535
| This email was intended for dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to receive emails from this list, you can unsubscribe here.
---
| Paid for by Citizens for Turner.
120 W. 2nd St, Dayton, OH 45402
(937) 222-7749
---

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: For those who want me “canceled”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this [link](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070415:6f1UEMuAN:m:1:3206719985:9C3E834C51F38F26A1C02A4DB5EFDFF7:r) **ALERT: I 've had enough of the far-left's cancel culture! ** _If you 're with me, please sign my petition today to #CANCELCancelCulture!_ [**SUPPORT SARAH FOR GOVERNOR >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070416:6f1UEMuAN:m:1:3206719985:9C3E834C51F38F26A1C02A4DB5EFDFF7:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070416:6f1UEMuAN:m:1:3206719985:9C3E834C51F38F26A1C02A4DB5EFDFF7:r) Peter, the leftist cancel culture is out of control. Because liberals don't like my policies or the president I worked for, they want me canceled. And they hope their intimidation tactics will keep me quiet! _**But Peter, I know who I am. I know what I stand for. And I don 't back down. **_ That's why I'm running for Governor, and I want you to join me today to help fight back against this "cancel culture" that wants conservatives like YOU and me silenced forever! **By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:** [**ONE CLICK DONATE: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070417:6f1UEMuAN:m:1:3206719985:9C3E834C51F38F26A1C02A4DB5EFDFF7:r) [**ONE CLICK DONATE: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070418:6f1UEMuAN:m:1:3206719985:9C3E834C51F38F26A1C02A4DB5EFDFF7:r) [**ONE CLICK DONATE: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070419:6f1UEMuAN:m:1:3206719985:9C3E834C51F38F26A1C02A4DB5EFDFF7:r) [**ONE CLICK DONATE: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070420:6f1UEMuAN:m:1:3206719985:9C3E834C51F38F26A1C02A4DB5EFDFF7:r) **By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:** Peter, as Governor, I will be your voice, and never let them "cancel" us. Not now. Not ever. Because I know it's hard-working Americans like you who make our country great. **I hope you 'll contribute today to help stand up to the radical leftist "cancel culture", and send a bold message that WE WILL NOT BE SILENCED: [https://secure.winred.com/sarah-for-governor/action-2124813/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070416:6f1UEMuAN:m:1:3206719985:9C3E834C51F38F26A1C02A4DB5EFDFF7:r)** [**CHIP IN NOW TO SUPPORT SARAH FOR GOVERNOR**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070416:6f1UEMuAN:m:1:3206719985:9C3E834C51F38F26A1C02A4DB5EFDFF7:r) Peter, I am truly honored to already have the support of great conservatives - both at home and across the country. I would really like you to join us and become an official supporter of my campaign today... But first, I want to share a little bit more about who I am and what I believe - including some things you might not know about me. As Governor, I will defend our American right to be free of socialism and tyranny, our Second Amendment rights to keep our families safe, and our freedom of speech and religious liberty. **_I will not be intimidated by the serious challenges we face._** _I will stand with our brave law enforcement officers and promote law and order, and keep our communities safe by eliminating sanctuary cities._ I will lower taxes to reward hard work, allow our businesses to compete, grow, and prosper, and create more good jobs. [**SUPPORT SARAH FOR GOVERNOR NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070416:6f1UEMuAN:m:1:3206719985:9C3E834C51F38F26A1C02A4DB5EFDFF7:r) I stand up for my principles. And I don't back down. It's what I've done my entire life. I am a Christian. A wife. A mom. A proud Arkansan. _**I am fighting for you ...**and I will not retreat, I will not surrender, and I will not bow down to the radical left. Not now. Not ever._ Because here's the truth... I never worry about the far-left and their allies at CNN or the New York Times defining me, because I have a Creator who has already done that. If you want to support me, please chip in now to contribute to my campaign. **[CHIP IN NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070416:6f1UEMuAN:m:1:3206719985:9C3E834C51F38F26A1C02A4DB5EFDFF7:r)** I believe we will succeed in making a better future, but only if we hold the line against the attacks on our freedom and push forward with fresh ideas under a new generation of leadership. **And though my opponents will do everything in their power to destroy me, I will NOT apologize for who I am or who I am fighting for.** **I hope you choose to become a supporter of my campaign making an immediate donation now:[https://secure.winred.com/sarah-for-governor/action-2124813/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070416:6f1UEMuAN:m:1:3206719985:9C3E834C51F38F26A1C02A4DB5EFDFF7:r)** Thank you for your time, Peter. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070416:6f1UEMuAN:m:1:3206719985:9C3E834C51F38F26A1C02A4DB5EFDFF7:r) Sarah Huckabee Sanders |
---
---
For more updates visit our site at [www.conservativedirect.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070415:6f1UEMuAN:m:1:3206719985:9C3E834C51F38F26A1C02A4DB5EFDFF7:r)
---

| Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600.

Corporate contributions are not permissible.

Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law.
State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

name: Team Youngkin
subject: Tired of staring at this screen? So are your kids.
body:
The career politicians in Richmond are failing our families. It is simply unacceptable that our state ranks 36th in opening our schools.
| [ ](https://hk.t.hubspotemail.net/e2t/tc/VW_McS8Wx_xjW4SxhCM6ldJh7W8hW1h34pLTmXN4qMxLG3lGnJV1-WJV7CgX7SW4VRcBj6pzQqSW2BDbbY5kcXKvW6Rc5N38LrQQRVq2_0P3dv7VCW2mZNPx763f_XW6PJhjZ2x81k9F2llCGMgLMyVtKTzB5jH9xFW16G-sT3-ydY7V5r7j98rB22wW6B-jF82_6yD3V3ZzYZ386GwBW1s4Rp-353JM9W11Z2-Z9js73fW1sBjQY1BqN8HW2JbNF259G4S6W83Qrt-8XwtgxW2jxSnz3N-KVFW40r86-9fh8BrW3Mjsdk50lbw4W5CJzlJ7NGtn4W33WKdN1Kc5tyW3Fy7dH1mvZbjW87gczZ9khQSMW6xKfPw6wMNXXW3VXvn78gzjTCW3TCxmJ8t_NHQN72jkyJSZq633by11)
---
The career politicians in Richmond are failing our families. It is simply unacceptable that our state ranks 36th in opening our schools. This is the McAuliffe-Northam plan: no leadership, no choice for parents, and fewer opportunities for kids. It’s time for a new kind of leader in Richmond who will stand up to the special interests and do what’s right for workers and families. Let's elect a political outsider for governor who will get the job done — let’s elect Glenn Youngkin.
---
| [ **Chip In to Help Our Children** ](https://hk.t.hubspotemail.net/e2t/tc/VW_McS8Wx_xjW4SxhCM6ldJh7W8hW1h34pLTmXN4qMxLG3lGnJV1-WJV7CgZvsW8mPNQJ4Nf-wPW1Tcz067x919tW1C21z27_8GqzW2YSs1d356RPXW3x68B920L7mQN17YSX1Dp7N1N2sTBdVVVRnZW7PCnJP3qK01gW2sd2L34df-pzW1PjQLq4skSlVW3BYbsj5rfz7MW5ZZQss9cxz-xW6QHnm_5LfBQJVFNtSG8fQ7NFVrLQS17b2kjKW3jPcjY21n05GW82JwzG23xd9zW6Gf52B82gblpW4sJJj313cJ0FW4NGlpc77bBh7W5M-l2r2nVxmNW1kLcMY99RLgtW1ywCnq8jyFK1W4CHd978hdR17M7mbw7v2jF4W6LwB9P2Fs-4GW8ksxKy2wB0-TW32D95V505sxv38g21)
---
Our students deserve better than a cold screen guiding them through life. They deserve the best education in the country regardless of ZIP code. Let’s give parents back their choice on how their children are educated by re-educating Richmond on how a governor should lead. Show your support for re-opening our schools by donating to Glenn Youngkin, a Governor who will put Virginia's children first. \- Team Youngkin
---
| | |

clean_body: The career politicians in Richmond are failing our families. It is simply unacceptable that our state ranks 36th in opening our schools. | The career politicians in Richmond are failing our families. It is simply unacceptable that our state ranks 36th in opening our schools. This is the McAuliffe-Northam plan: no leadership, no choice for parents, and fewer opportunities for kids. It’s time for a new kind of leader in Richmond who will stand up to the special interests and do what’s right for workers and families. Let's elect a political outsider for governor who will get the job done — let’s elect Glenn Youngkin. | Our students deserve better than a cold screen guiding them through life. They deserve the best education in the country regardless of ZIP code. Let’s give parents back their choice on how their children are educated by re-educating Richmond on how a governor should lead. Show your support for re-opening our schools by donating to Glenn Youngkin, a Governor who will put Virginia's children first. \- Team Youngkin | | | ---|---|--- Youngkin for Governor, PO Box 3950, Merrifield, VA 22116

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. name: Ron Johnson
subject: Deaf, Dumb, and Blind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC
body:
Friend,

Kamala Harris is the worst person President Biden could have picked to lead the response to the growing crisis on the southern border. During my Homeland Security Committee chairmanship, we held 30 hearings on illegal immigration and border security, and Harris did nothing to help solve the problem. She came to hearings and asked obnoxious questions of ICE and CBP, basically accusing them of inhumanity. She actually compared ICE to the Ku Klux Klan. She had no interest whatsoever in working with me and the administration to secure the border and stop the flow. And President Biden picked her to clean up the mess he created. Unbelievable.

Four to six thousand migrants are being apprehended daily, with even more crossing illegally and not getting caught. That's a large caravan of migrants each and every day. Drug traffickers, members of dangerous gangs, and human traffickers are exploiting this crisis created by President Biden. The traffickers are some of the most evil people on the planet, and the Biden administration is facilitating their billion dollar business model.

Migrants are charged thousands of dollars by the traffickers - money most do not have. How do you think they pay it back? They are forced into involuntary servitude, prostitution, and illegal gang activity. The human depredations inflicted on the migrants are horrific, and yet Biden and Harris choose to ignore it.

By putting Kamala in charge, the Biden administration still clearly refuses to acknowledge this disaster. They are deaf, dumb, and blind to the real dangers that exist. Sex traffickers, human traffickers, and drug traffickers are having a field day, and it is a direct cause of the Biden administration's policies. Putting Kamala Harris to lead the response is not only brazen, it adds insult to the injury.

That is why I need your help. To date, the Biden administration has not allowed media access to the most tragic border areas and facilities, and [**we need to make sure we have the funds necessary to let the world know what the real situation is down at the border.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LMfZv12krdWd9Qy_xr7F_5vBNG9J8O910AZ4uaA_l0tTjJn0va69f99P-QFEVApo7x-okn5NgzuV8uoBOtBUjxnXPajy-4tD5JEua0PtUwALkuEP6SugorkKK5cZ_bXRNA9XkSXOW0n3bpELjCChhHvNecLXmhbyRvZEXK4aI1_m4MZjXmoaJYIFa3HPdP09vsp6HTCBUznZ0G2aeXs5VmE9Z50999272QaiA0xjTy0LEukZmDEE2TtpgnLgYKWfgS0bf935OIvpbH120omMbUw0ToJL6tZ1_VqE3tdCVEQkpQyJisw-MogR8T4Gfr8SVvQABSghzNmvsr0r9WwbVBk72jCzIhKKbSGLC9kv45QDTBNqZ9dEkFPKQMiQruwo2Am98Uj_p09_8FKyGKismw==&c=e4Wg8H7eB7hXu2hCFlP07DrDvG-Id6SQhRwWRaC5TrDeNszFdPPtRQ==&ch=VizBNug5I-MLHFPowGBwUIPUkWpbzK4eHnRZNh8xV0aYupT9VXWHUg==)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57069983:6V5IHMudN:m:1:3206719985:A64C1CD8437E76C7F47EE137F8B8B181:r "Headline") Peter: You may think Stacey Abrams is not a threat because she didn't win the Georgia race for Governor in 2018, but I'm here to tell you that if we don't stop her now, her meteoric rise in progressive circles has her well on her way to winning the White House within a matter of a few years. Stacey Abrams was determined to deliver 2 U.S. Senate seats to Democrats by hook or by crook and she did just that in January. Now that she's the darling of the left, she's taking her "voter registration" efforts national thanks to the support of the progressive millionaires and billionaires who are backing her efforts and gaining her support among tens of millions of voters. Meanwhile the liberals in Washington are doing their part by trampling on our rights as voters through their disastrous HR1 "For the People" proposal that reads like a communist manifesto. **Together, they could change the political landscape in America for generations - unless we stand up RIGHT NOW.** **[Someone needs to stand up to Stacey Abrams, and the New Journey PAC is on the ground already- all we need is your immediate support to get started.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57069983:6V5IHMudN:m:1:3206719985:A64C1CD8437E76C7F47EE137F8B8B181:r "Someone needs to stand up to Stacey Abrams, and the New Journey PAC is on the ground already – all we need is your immediate support to
get started.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57069983:6V5IHMudN:m:1:3206719985:A64C1CD8437E76C7F47EE137F8B8B181:r "Rush")My name is James Golden, but you may know me as Mr. Snerdley, call screener and producer for radio legend Rush Limbaugh. I worked for Rush for almost 30 years, and I learned a lot sitting beside a great man like him every day. I started the New Journey to make Black America Conservative Again. We are fighting the entire liberal racist establishment as they spend millions of dollars to steal ANOTHER election. **[We are seeking to open offices in Georgia to counter the Stacey Abrams machine, and we need you to stand with us and rush an EMERGENCY donation to this effort before it is too late.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57069983:6V5IHMudN:m:1:3206719985:A64C1CD8437E76C7F47EE137F8B8B181:r "We are seeking to open offices
in Georgia to counter the Stacey Abrams machine, and we need you to stand with us and rush an EMERGENCY donation to this effort before it is too
late.")** **Stacey is a progressive hero, more powerful than AOC, and can do no wrong with the liberal media, even though she was under investigation for seeking to "aggressively" register "ineligible, out-of-state, or deceased voters" before the state's Jan. 5 Senate runoff elections.** None of that matters to liberals. Just take HR1, a bill that could be headed to President Biden's desk in a few WEEKS. This bill will DESTROY the American voting system and take away every protection we have against socialism, all at the stroke of a pen. None of it matters, so long as Democrats win. We don't have time to wait - the New Journey PAC is fighting alone, and we badly need your help. **[Please make an emergency donation in the next 24 hours so we can fight the good fight in Georgia, and anywhere else Stacey Abrams tries her shenanigans.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57069983:6V5IHMudN:m:1:3206719985:A64C1CD8437E76C7F47EE137F8B8B181:r "Please make an emergency donation in the next 24 hours so we can

name: =?utf-8?Q?JohnFetterman.com?=
subject: re: Exclusive data from our ActBlue account
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hi Peter,
It's Eric Stern, John Fetterman's deputy campaign manager and proud Pennsylvanian. 💙
Thank you for supporting our grassroots campaign so far. **I 'm reaching out today to show you some exclusive data from our ActBlue account.**
Now look, typically I like to keep ActBlue data close to the chest. But with only three days until the end of Q1, I think it's urgent that you see this.
As yinz may know, we've set a goal to raise at least $500,000 between yesterday and our first-ever FEC filing deadline, this Wednesday, March 31. **Here 's an update on our goal from the backend of our ActBlue account (but keep it on the down low):**
[](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=f8c59a6f16&e=0490676c9f)
By the looks of it, we're closer than ever to meeting our $500,000 goal, which is super.
The only problem is that our overall fundraising has been a little slower than we hoped it would be over the past week. I asked our finance staffers to run the numbers again and again.
**If we don 't pick up the pace, there is a chance we could fall short of our fundraising goal before the FEC filing deadline on Wednesday.**
Here's a fundraising chart I was able to pull from ActBlue (just don't show it to anyone):
[](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=e8bdc99240&e=0490676c9f)
Hey, it's totally possible to turn this trend around within the next few hours. In fact, I guarantee that if everyone I email today chipped in at least $5 -- including you -- we'll be back on track to meet our fundraising goal in no time.
[_**So, what do you say? Can you make a donation of $25 to help get our campaign back on track to raising $500,000 before the FEC filing deadline on March 31? I hope John and I can count on you.**_](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=836409c305&e=0490676c9f)
**[Donate](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=a2d0eed173&e=0490676c9f)**
Thanks for all you do,
Eric
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
P.S. You may have noticed that our campaign uses the word "yinz" a lot. Yinz is the Pittsburgh equivalent to "y'all"! [**_Chip in a donation to help send John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate where he 'll fight for all of yinz._**](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=04842eb810&e=0490676c9f)
**[Donate](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=0587c2e1fd&e=0490676c9f)**
---
Paid for by Fetterman for PA
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=26849d668e&e=0490676c9f). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=864dcb2a0a&e=0490676c9f&c=648f3316e7). Mail us: Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh.

name: Michael Laws
subject: 9 hours left - Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court Fundraising Deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court
body:
Dear Friend,

Our fundraising team just let us know that we are only $1,453 away from our fundraising goal.

[Can you chip in now to help us reach our goal by midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26914100/278445881/1565234157?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjIvMS84OTM4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGY2MGRmNi1jMDkwLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CReGTO782XFXm3brH200TUpxVJGwYsZM3MGtS1Yyuo0=&emci=8027fcff-a990-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=f8f60df6-c090-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=1353776)

name: Rep. Nancy Mace
subject: I know a thing or two about deadlines...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
House Republicans have a BIG DEADLINE coming up.

Hey, Fellow Conservative. Do you have any kids? I'm a single mother of 2 great kids, ages 11 and 14.

Soccer. Basketball. Virtual school. Friends. Sometimes, I think my kids are busier than I am-and I'm a sitting member of Congress! Keeping track of our family's busy schedule has taught me a thing or two about deadlines. **And speaking of, House Republicans have a BIG DEADLINE coming up.**

In just two days we will be at the end of the first quarter of 2021, Fellow Conservative, and _**we are WAY behind on our fundraising goal to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE and fire Nancy Pelosi once and for all! **_
[**STAND WITH NANCY - 3X MATCH FOR 30 MINS**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MFvGGIsG7gU6yRrAMRdjz9GYX0YSq8Cagv3sd_CoQwHhm3-NogjZ-C8OwlbnP8KhLUEPWnmpSZOMaEftSNCupFGQ1WyiYMZdl24fAY2-aACbNczopvZL3P5OBJgxVsVMhmvyi7xwjCClUDQx3iu0iTQdXwryuwtyR24RCfwZTVC4Eqjg3ScXi4wm7rI4csgDK55GpeUy8ZM_1HyYYAOOiGzuamEDRuWAIa8gfdwVSP6cKjcWWz3h2JTxwCtw-VSX1glZsCCTNWbUjpYJD39boRoikv_y7m9mQDntuicvzlnLA6WsKvvgKbRl85snmXJYeRy7IAbRuNmsFeme5eEdEseyx8SM5pQeU__zK62qKhbeQ35aeiF3ySs4OBWxT_nElE4oQLePbqVGIGPFMI9mCrEKlyD0K-b3DjSkuZCAekUVfdhsvNnthXaxiDm4yVk_&c=g59ZtwYlP0A1T1G3ks-mUEQRJ68di1wvDjlk-Ttskiel8_PNfKWKCg==&ch=UpxTVHUxnaUEzmIFEuNcESFp3yDuMsBs_6fGA0WzfGQvB5bEPDK1MA==)

[**STAND WITH NANCY - 3X MATCH FOR 30 MINS**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MFvGGIsG7gU6yRrAMRdjz9GYX0YSq8Cagv3sd_CoQwHhm3-NogjZ-C8OwlbnP8KhLUEPWnmpSZOMaEftSNCupFGQ1WyiYMZdl24fAY2-aACbNczopvZL3P5OBJgxVsVMhmvyi7xwjCClUDQx3iu0iTQdXwryuwtyR24RCfwZTVC4Eqjg3ScXi4wm7rI4csgDK55GpeUy8ZM_1HyYYAOOiGzuamEDRuWAIa8gfdwVSP6cKjcWWz3h2JTxwCtw-VSX1glZsCCTNWbUjpYJD39boRoikv_y7m9mQDntuicvzlnLA6WsKvvgKbRl85snmXJYeRy7IAbRuNmsFeme5eEdEseyx8SM5pQeU__zK62qKhbeQ35aeiF3ySs4OBWxT_nElE4oQLePbqVGIGPFMI9mCrEKlyD0K-b3DjSkuZCAekUVfdhsvNnthXaxiDm4yVk_&c=g59ZtwYlP0A1T1G3ks-mUEQRJ68di1wvDjlk-Ttskiel8_PNfKWKCg==&ch=UpxTVHUxnaUEzmIFEuNcESFp3yDuMsBs_6fGA0WzfGQvB5bEPDK1MA==)

Fellow Conservative, I don't need to tell you how important taking back the House is.

A Republican majority in the House means:
* Saying HELL NO to socialism.
* Protecting our borders and putting America First.
* Promoting prosperity and lowering taxes.

[**STAND WITH NANCY - 3X MATCH FOR 30 MINS**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MFvGGIsG7gU6yRrAMRdjz9GYX0YSq8Cagv3sd_CoQwHhm3-NogjZ-C8OwlbnP8KhLUEPWnmpSZOMaEftSNCupFGQ1WyiYMZdl24fAY2-aACbNczopvZL3P5OBJgxVsVMhmvyi7xwjCClUDQx3iu0iTQdXwryuwtyR24RCfwZTVC4Eqjg3ScXi4wm7rI4csgDK55GpeUy8ZM_1HyYYAOOiGzuamEDRuWAIa8gfdwVSP6cKjcWWz3h2JTxwCtw-VSX1glZsCCTNWbUjpYJD39boRoikv_y7m9mQDntuicvzlnLA6WsKvvgKbRl85snmXJYeRy7IAbRuNmsFeme5eEdEseyx8SM5pQeU__zK62qKhbeQ35aeiF3ySs4OBWxT_nElE4oQLePbqVGIGPFMI9mCrEKlyD0K-b3DjSkuZCAekUVfdhsvNnthXaxiDm4yVk_&c=g59ZtwYlP0A1T1G3ks-mUEQRJ68di1wvDjlk-Ttskiel8_PNfKWKCg==&ch=UpxTVHUxnaUEzmIFEuNcESFp3yDuMsBs_6fGA0WzfGQvB5bEPDK1MA==)

Sincerely,

Nancy Mace

name: Nikki Haley
subject: This can't wait
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE**
body:
I'm personally reaching out because this is too urgent to wait!

Friend,

I'm personally reaching out because this is too urgent to wait!

With the radical Left in complete control of our government, they have been working overtime to enact their socialist agenda.

It's essential that we crush EVERY deadline to ensure we have the funds to win back the Senate Majority and stop the Democrats from destroying our nation.

But unfortunately, we are BEHIND on our upcoming fundraising goal. **[That's why I'm reaching out to see if you will make a donation before midnight to help us restore a Conservative Senate Majority.](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/nikki-haley-senate-majority/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210329_TY.100609_nikki-haley_t1054498-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210329_this-cant-wait/)**
[Take A Stand](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/nikki-haley-senate-majority/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210329_TY.100609_nikki-haley_t1054498-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210329_this-cant-wait/)
---

**Let me be clear:** Your immediate support will make a difference.

Every deadline between now and Election Day _must_ be met if we want to stand a chance against the Democrats and their record-breaking fundraising.

There's no time to waste and failing to meet our goal will only put our efforts further behind! The fight to win back the Senate won't be easy, but with your support it will be possible.

[**I know how dedicated you are to protecting your freedoms and conservative values, so will you please join me in taking a stand NOW?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/nikki-haley-senate-majority/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210329_TY.100609_nikki-haley_t1054498-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210329_this-cant-wait/)

My very best,

Nikki Haley
**

****

body:
We need every commonsense Californian on board to recall Gavin Newsom. Read more >>
Peter, _You’ve probably heard the news by now that Gavin Newsom is very likely headed for a recall election this November._ Over 2 MILLION signatures were collected (well past the 1.5 million required to trigger a recall), and now we’re just waiting on official verification from state officials. This is great news for getting our state back on track, and fixing Newsom’s many failures sooner rather than later! **We need every single Californian who cares about our state on board to recall Newsom and elect Kevin Faulconer, a proven leader. According to our records, you haven’t chipped in yet, Peter. We need you now!** **DONOR STATUS** **SUPPORTER** : dpwillis67@gmail.com **RECORD** : **MISSING** **SUGGESTED AMOUNT** : **$25** [ DONATE NOW >> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/031ea41ae5b4d58f/d0a58be42ce58792c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Our first critical fundraising deadline is coming up fast at MIDNIGHT on March 31st, and we need to hit our goal to mobilize our grassroots team to get out the vote for Kevin.
_**Can we count on you?**_
**[Chip in now and help make the difference in the Golden State!>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/031ea41ae5b4d58f/82a01801dd849292c3d6b838967d376c/34943)**
Thanks for your support,
Team Faulconer | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/031ea41ae5b4d58f/dd3288aac618977fc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/031ea41ae5b4d58f/2df35bdaab75560dc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/031ea41ae5b4d58f/ebe04514a0f7585bc3d6b838967d376c/34943)

Josh Hawley, Ted Cruz, and I stood for **_election integrity_** and fair elections. **_I took on Joe Biden’s ridiculous executive order_** letting boys play girls’ sports. I went to the southern border to see the **_Biden Border Crisis_** firsthand.

**As a result,** the Swamp, the woke left, and their allies in the media have attacked me. Countless corporations have refused to give me future donations... _because I’ve stood for our conservative values and done what I said I’d do._

That’s just fine by me. I ran to be a conservative voice for Kansans and all Americans — not another tool of the Swamp.

**Now, we’re at another critical moment. We’re just over 48 hours out from our _first_ End of Quarter fundraising deadline of 2021... and I’ve set a goal of raising another $40,000 to meet the moment.**

I am proud of what we have accomplished together here in Helena -- we have tackled the big issues as a city and I’m ready to listen to our neighbors and what they need to continue improving our great city every day.

I am officially announcing my re-election run for Mayor! Four years ago, I won by organizing the Bedrock city of Montana and had thousands of supporters who helped me do it. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | My campaign started based on my motivations to increase funding for our essential services and first responders, provide a way out to those experiencing homelessness and increasing affordable housing units. Together, in 2020, when many communities were tragically devastated by the COVID-19 pandemic, the people of Helena worked tirelessly together to keep our city, local businesses, and schools supported. The city of Helena was virtually uninterrupted in its delivery of services to our residents. I am proud of what we have accomplished together here in Helena -- we have tackled the big issues as a city and I’m ready to listen to our neighbors and what they need to continue improving our great city every day. Thank you for being on my team, Wilmot Collins Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Please
body:
#

Friends,
Over the next few days, my team and I will be reaching out with some important requests. Will you give me a minute to explain why they are so important?
Our first FEC fundraising deadline of 2021 is coming up this Monday at midnight. Our goal is to secure 25,000 donations by then, and it's crucial that we don't fall short.
It's always important for us to hit our goals, but this one is especially so. Right now, any donation you make will go straight towards our efforts to urge the Senate to bring universal background checks up for a debate and vote. The sooner we can achieve that, the sooner we can save lives.
That's why we need to dig deep and hit this goal by Wednesday. The more people who chip in and show their support, the better chance we have at passing this legislation in the Senate and putting it on President Biden's desk.
Right now, my team tells me we're still a little behind on our goal. But if we can pick up the pace before Wednesday, I think we can get there. So, I have to ask:
[**Can you make a $3 donation to Giffords PAC today? Thank you in advance for your continued support,
All my best,
Gabby

clean_body: Friends, Over the next few days, my team and I will be reaching out with some important requests. Will you give me a minute to explain why they are so important? Our first FEC fundraising deadline of 2021 is coming up this Monday at midnight. Our goal is to secure 25,000 donations by then, and it's crucial that we don't fall short. It's always important for us to hit our goals, but this one is especially so. Right now, any donation you make will go straight towards our efforts to urge the Senate to bring universal background checks up for a debate and vote. The sooner we can achieve that, the sooner we can save lives. That's why we need to dig deep and hit this goal by Wednesday. The more people who chip in and show their support, the better chance we have at passing this legislation in the Senate and putting it on President Biden's desk. Right now, my team tells me we're still a little behind on our goal. But if we can pick up the pace before Wednesday, I think we can get there. So, I have to ask: "" If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | "" | "" ---|--- "" | "" ---|--- "" | "" ---|--- Our goal doesn't come from nowhere -- it's the amount of donations we have calculated we need to push for this gun safety legislation and prove that there is ample support for universal background checks. And right now, timing is everything. We've experienced multiple tragedies in March that have reignited the national conversation around gun safety. We can't afford to wait until the next tragedy to act. The time for action is now. Thank you in advance for your continued support, All my best, Gabby "" *

clean_body: \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | Friend, I’m sorry to reach out to you again, but this is important. TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M. is our final pre-election filing deadline for the April 6th elections. This will be the last time we publicly report our fundraising totals. We need to be sure that we outraise Tony Evers’ Democrats and stay on track for victory next Tuesday. But I just got off the phone with our team, and I’ve learned we’re still $3,216 behind on our goal. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Rebecca Kleefisch Sent: Fri, Mar 26, 2021 Subject: Pre-election Filing Deadline 📎 To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, I need your urgent help reaching our fundraising goal before the pre-election filing deadline for the April 6th elections. Winning these local elections will be our first big chance to get life in Wisconsin back to normal. That’s why I’ve been working so hard to ensure conservatives win these critical races. But victory can only happen if we reach our fundraising goal before the final pre-election filing deadline. The largest school district in Wisconsin just CAVED to the teacher’s union, announcing that most high school students in Milwaukee will not be returning to the classroom this year. The CDC has clearly stated that in-person learning can be done “safely.” But Tony Evers doesn’t have the backbone to stand up to the teacher’s union and do what’s right for Wisconsin’s students. What breaks my heart is that these kids will NEVER get this lost time back. These are fundamental, life-changing moments in a young person’s life that have been thrown away for the sake of politics. But on April 6, we have the opportunity to elect leaders with the guts to stand up for Wisconsinites who continue to get left behind by Tony Evers. Now I need your help reaching our fundraising goal to deliver a resounding victory for families all over Wisconsin. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Paid for by Rebecca PAC PO Box 620215, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action Items for week of Mar. 29: Stop election fraud from being legalized!
body:
| |
---
For the next two weeks, the Senate is in recess. We can use this time to call their local offices, educate our fellow citizens about how bad the Corrupt Politicians Act (HR 1/S 1) is, and work on other items.

The Senate held its hearing on the Corrupt Politicians Act last week, and from our friends at Heritage Action for America, here’s what’s coming next:
_The Rules Committee is likely to mark the bill up the week of April 18. The vote out of Committee will almost certainly be straight party-line. After that, the bill would head to the Senate floor, but only if Senator Manchin supports the bill and also supports ending the filibuster to pass it. Today he indicated that he supports some provisions in the bill, but that a bill dealing with elections should be bipartisan. He will be under enormous pressure if he is the only Democrat that blocks this bill, so we can’t let our guard down any time soon and should continue the strategy of focusing on all target states' and their Senators: WV, AZ, NH, MT and GA._
Note that April 5-9, the left is going to hold a week of action to push for the Corrupt Politicians Act, and we are thinking of holding a week of action to fight against it. Stay tuned for more information on that.

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
Share these Items – Corrupt Politicians Act
Share the following items on social media and/or via email. We need to educate people on the dangers of the Corrupt Politicians Act.

**[Share this Freeroots campaign](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg4LTQxOGY0YWE1NTRhYTQ4NTBhY2U3MmJjZWUyMzc2NzVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlcm9vdHMuY29tL2dvL2ZpZ2h0LTQtZmlsaWJ1c3Rlcj9taWQ9NDM1NjcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=42J9ZJaeKfVwtLmNdfvUNg) after you use it to take action.** Freeroots is an online activism portal that makes it super easy to act! You basically click a couple of times and boom, activism done.

**[Share the video testimony](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg4LTQxOGY0YWE1NTRhYTQ4NTBhY2U3MmJjZWUyMzc2NzVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AZmlsZTovLy9Vc2VyIENsaXAvIFdhcm5lciBvbiBTMSB8IEMtU1BBTi5vcmcgKGMtc3Bhbi5vcmcpP21pZD00MzU2NyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=3GMCVQXRul4UlBUquvTzvQ) of West Virginia Secretary of State Mac Warner** at the Senate hearing on the Corrupt Politicians Act.

Share these articles by Ken Blackwell:
* **[The Left’s Hoodwinking of America](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg4LTQxOGY0YWE1NTRhYTQ4NTBhY2U3MmJjZWUyMzc2NzVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90b3duaGFsbC5jb20vY29sdW1uaXN0cy9rZW5ibGFja3dlbGwvMjAyMS8wMy8yMy90aGUtbGVmdHMtaG9vZHdpbmtpbmctb2YtYW1lcmljLW4yNTg2NzAxP21pZD00MzU2NyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=jhkmus4jb-ojVoQ7FZ4m7Q)**
* **[Corrupt Politicians Act Destroys Right to Election Integrity Like Voter ID](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg4LTQxOGY0YWE1NTRhYTQ4NTBhY2U3MmJjZWUyMzc2NzVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlaXRiYXJ0LmNvbS9wb2xpdGljcy8yMDIxLzAzLzI0L2NvcnJ1cHQtcG9saXRpY2lhbnMtYWN0LWRlc3Ryb3lzLXJpZ2h0LXRvLWVsZWN0aW9uLWludGVncml0eS1saWtlLXZvdGVyLWlkLz9taWQ9NDM1NjcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=RXpiKHMb7b-fbqyLhSEIFQ)**
* **[The Other Voting Right: Protecting Every Citizen's Vote by Safeguarding the Integrity of the Ballot Box](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg4LTQxOGY0YWE1NTRhYTQ4NTBhY2U3MmJjZWUyMzc2NzVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kaWdpdGFsY29tbW9ucy5sYXcueWFsZS5lZHUvY2dpL3ZpZXdjb250ZW50LmNnaT9hcnRpY2xlPTE1ODUmY29udGV4dD15bHByJm1pZD00MzU2NyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=_rXmGBt13OPgs8Be53PJEA)** (co-authored by Ken Klukowski, this one is a lengthy piece in Yale Law & Policy Review)

**[Share this cartoon](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg4LTQxOGY0YWE1NTRhYTQ4NTBhY2U3MmJjZWUyMzc2NzVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kYWlseXRvcmNoLmNvbS8yMDIxLzAzL2NhcnRvb24tYS1yb3lhbC1kaXNhc3Rlci8_bWlkPTQzNTY3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=xVppBeevH5ZmJEFZ12gGZw) from Americans for Limited Government.**
|
---
Last week Democrats formally began the process of moving H.R.1 (aka the Corrupt Politicians Act) through the Senate.

The bill, now known as S. 1 was taken up by the U.S. Senate Committee on Rules & Administration, where the radical progressives’ blatant partisan power-grab was exposed to the light.

Not only does it eliminate voter ID laws, ballot-trafficking prevention laws, and common-sense election security measures, all on the taxpayer’s dime...

But, as C. Boyden Gray points out, [H.R. 1 Is a Constitutional Disaster in the Making](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg4LTQxOGY0YWE1NTRhYTQ4NTBhY2U3MmJjZWUyMzc2NzVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmV3c3dlZWsuY29tL2hyLTEtY29uc3RpdHV0aW9uYWwtZGlzYXN0ZXItbWFraW5nLW9waW5pb24tMTU3Nzk3Mz9taWQ9NDM1NjcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=daIXm4GWZmPlQsfTHEwgcQ).
|
---
Call Your Senators’ Local Offices
Your Senators are on recess this week, so call their local office, while they are home. There are three messages you need to give when you call. There are multiple local offices, so just pick one to call, or call all of them if you have the time, and feel free to just simply read the three messages straight off of this email. **Note: To find your senator’s local office contact information,[visit the official Senate contact page](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg4LTQxOGY0YWE1NTRhYTQ4NTBhY2U3MmJjZWUyMzc2NzVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi9zZW5hdG9ycy9zZW5hdG9ycy1jb250YWN0Lmh0bT9taWQ9NDM1NjcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=vXjUHJMuKgbXURvsgMDmmg), find your senator and click “Contact” below their photo. This will send you to the official website of the Senator. Their site should have a menu item (Contact, Locations, etc.) that will have a list of their different local offices.**

**Message #1**
Tell them to vote no on the Corrupt Politicians Act (bill number S. 1).
* _**The key message is that we want to make it easy to vote, but hard to cheat**_ , and S. 1 makes cheating much easier.
* If you want more background on how bad the Corrupt Politicians Act is, [read through a summary of this monstrosity on our website](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg4LTQxOGY0YWE1NTRhYTQ4NTBhY2U3MmJjZWUyMzc2NzVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcC1jb3JydXB0LXBvbGl0aWNpYW5zLz9taWQ9NDM1NjcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=Ghy3CxkJi7KCxHCmpf4nyA) and our [how-to guide](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg4LTQxOGY0YWE1NTRhYTQ4NTBhY2U3MmJjZWUyMzc2NzVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL0hSMV9Qcm90ZWN0X0VsZWN0aW9uX0ludGVncml0eV9Ib3dfVG9fR3VpZGUucGRmP21pZD00MzU2NyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=aOSyQ9llH6exfyXLV4laUg).

**Message #2**
Tell them to keep the filibuster and to oppose any attempts to get rid of it or change it.

**Message #3**
Tell them to oppose all attempts at amnesty for illegal immigrants, to finish the wall, and to demand the Biden administration resume President Trump’s immigration policies.
* You can also use [this Freeroots campaign](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg4LTQxOGY0YWE1NTRhYTQ4NTBhY2U3MmJjZWUyMzc2NzVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlcm9vdHMuY29tL2dvL2RvbnQtY3VvbW8tYW1lcmljYT9taWQ9NDM1NjcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=ntM8-FiCEPQJPAjQcPIH3g) to tell the Senate to stop amnesty and secure the border, with just a couple of quick clicks! Be sure to share it when you’re done!

[FIND MY SENATORS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg4LTQxOGY0YWE1NTRhYTQ4NTBhY2U3MmJjZWUyMzc2NzVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi9zZW5hdG9ycy9zZW5hdG9ycy1jb250YWN0Lmh0bT9taWQ9NDM1NjcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=JlVl04WuUDjWffoIUdXu4A)
|
---
In last week’s newsletter, we told you about how the inevitable Biden Border Crisis was escalating and reaching a point where the media couldn’t possibly ignore it anymore. We detailed the extent of the crisis, the cause of the crisis, and the Biden Administration’s attempt to cover it up.

And now, a mere week later, we’ve seen that what we’ve been predicting since the start of the 2020 campaign season became a reality. A migrant surge at our southern border, directly caused by the rhetoric of prominent Democrats (including Joe Biden), is wreaking havoc on our immigration system. Migrants are showing up en mass citing the utopian promises of Democrats and the Biden Administration has no idea what to do.With the surge reaching unprecedented levels, the White House is scrambling to find a way out of this.The office of former President Trump slammed the Biden Administration’s response, accusing President Biden of causing “death and human tragedy” with his controversial immigration policies.

**[Fox News had the story.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg4LTQxOGY0YWE1NTRhYTQ4NTBhY2U3MmJjZWUyMzc2NzVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTI%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvYmlkZW4tYm9yZGUtcnN1cmdlP21pZD00MzU2NyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=bJW71nCZKTLJ7VpRAugKwQ)**
|
---
Sign up for Working Groups
We are launching our Election Integrity working group and our Immigration working group, and want you to be a part of them, based on your interests. We want people to be able to work on the issues they are most passionate about, and to have the opportunity to focus on and learn more about those issues.

**[Sign up for the Election Integrity working group](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg4LTQxOGY0YWE1NTRhYTQ4NTBhY2U3MmJjZWUyMzc2NzVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTM%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvZzRMNTVhYnFwZ3FVSDhQRzg_bWlkPTQzNTY3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=aE5M_ePL4I_7c2zjKo39Gw)**
**[Sign up for the Immigration working group](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg4LTQxOGY0YWE1NTRhYTQ4NTBhY2U3MmJjZWUyMzc2NzVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvMkg5TGh1c2dNNWRHOXhZcjY_bWlkPTQzNTY3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=X9b6CIONGRV767bCgGJeRw)**
|
---
Benjamin Franklin once famously said, “In this world nothing is certain but death and taxes.”

But, we’re pretty confident there’s a 3rd certainty: **taxes will be increased under Democrat “leadership.”** And Joe Biden seems to be proving the truth of this universal certainty, as he prepares a variety of new taxes and tax increases on the American people.

Joe Biden is set to go back on his word regarding raising taxes on every-day, hard-working Americans. He promised Democrat voters he would never do this, they bought his lies, we never did... and now here we, all Americans, are about to pay the price for the gullible.

There are very few certainties in life, but that’s one of them.
|
---
‘Support The Epoch Times’ Petition
**[Please sign our petition to support The Epoch Times.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg4LTQxOGY0YWE1NTRhYTQ4NTBhY2U3MmJjZWUyMzc2NzVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTU%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9lcG9jaHRpbWVzLmFjdC50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy8_bWlkPTQzNTY3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=LkrZ_zxv1fw0is_E4DAbiA)** The House press gallery is trying to block The Epoch Times by not renewing their press credentials, punishing them because they report the truth about Democrats and the Chinese Communists.

[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg4LTQxOGY0YWE1NTRhYTQ4NTBhY2U3MmJjZWUyMzc2NzVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTY%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9lcG9jaHRpbWVzLmFjdC50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy8_bWlkPTQzNTY3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=bBWlufvJQlbTJ6YCTEwxvw)

|
---
In a world that seems to lack common sense more and more each day, it’s nice to see that some of our elected officials still have it...

Last week, Sen. Tom Cotton introduced legislation to ban critical race theory from being taught in the military. Sen. Cotton said, “Our military’s strength depends on the unity of our troops and the knowledge that America is a noble nation worth fighting for...”

He continued by saying, “Critical race theory teaches that race is a person’s most important characteristic, and that America is an evil, oppressive place. That idea may be fashionable in left-wing circles and college classrooms, but it has no place in our military. Not only will such racist ideas undermine our troops’ faith in each other, they’ll also erode their trust in our country’s guiding principles. The United States military shouldn’t be promoting such divisive, un-American ideas."

**[Fox News has the story.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg4LTQxOGY0YWE1NTRhYTQ4NTBhY2U3MmJjZWUyMzc2NzVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTc%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvdG9tLWNvdHRvbi1jcml0aWNhbC1yYWNlLXRoZW9yeT9taWQ9NDM1NjcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=S7kh9eK7GzTB-SLAMnvwTg)**
|
---
Sign the Letter Opposing Earmarks
We’ve written a letter to Congress condemning the practice of earmarks, and asking each of them to sign our No Earmark Pledge. If you’d like to send a letter to your Representative asking them to sign the pledge, simply [go to our website and sign onto the letter](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg4LTQxOGY0YWE1NTRhYTQ4NTBhY2U3MmJjZWUyMzc2NzVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcC10aGUtY3VycmVuY3ktb2YtY29ycnVwdGlvbi8_bWlkPTQzNTY3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=pKxvC30y-EzJuc6Oo9Pb2w). Then, ask others to do the same on social media or via email.
[SIGN THE LETTER](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg4LTQxOGY0YWE1NTRhYTQ4NTBhY2U3MmJjZWUyMzc2NzVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTk%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcC10aGUtY3VycmVuY3ktb2YtY29ycnVwdGlvbi8_bWlkPTQzNTY3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=B5u1bY2OUAZB1u6bUSqXKA)
|

In liberty,

Jenny Beth

clean_body: | | For the next two weeks, the Senate is in recess. We can use this time to call their local offices, educate our fellow citizens about how bad the Corrupt Politicians Act (HR 1/S 1) is, and work on other items. The Senate held its hearing on the Corrupt Politicians Act last week, and from our friends at Heritage Action for America, here’s what’s coming next: The Rules Committee is likely to mark the bill up the week of April 18. The vote out of Committee will almost certainly be straight party-line. After that, the bill would head to the Senate floor, but only if Senator Manchin supports the bill and also supports ending the filibuster to pass it. Today he indicated that he supports some provisions in the bill, but that a bill dealing with elections should be bipartisan. He will be under enormous pressure if he is the only Democrat that blocks this bill, so we can’t let our guard down any time soon and should continue the strategy of focusing on all target states' and their Senators: WV, AZ, NH, MT and GA. Note that April 5-9, the left is going to hold a week of action to push for the Corrupt Politicians Act, and we are thinking of holding a week of action to fight against it. Stay tuned for more information on that. Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it. | Share these Items – Corrupt Politicians Act Share the following items on social media and/or via email. name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: re: how’s Biden doing?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this [link](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070041:J2br7MuNZ:m:1:3206719985:3323C40BC2F57DC0DCF16141FCDEA2DD:r) **WE 'RE JUST GETTING STARTED** _It 's time to stand by battle-tested conservatives like Sarah Huckabee Sanders to help hold-the-line against liberal radicalism!_ [**SUPPORT SARAH FOR GOVERNOR >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070042:J2br7MuNZ:m:1:3206719985:3323C40BC2F57DC0DCF16141FCDEA2DD:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070042:J2br7MuNZ:m:1:3206719985:3323C40BC2F57DC0DCF16141FCDEA2DD:r) Peter, with just a few short months in office, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have made it clear they're saying goodbye to the "America FIRST" agenda of President Trump.
* They're reentering terrible international agreements
* They're welcoming caravans of illegal immigrants through our southern border
* They've nominated literal socialists to the cabinet
* They've canceled the Keystone XL and they've turned the COVID relief bill into a far-left wish list

And it's Americans like us who have to deal with the fallout! The only way to defend against these radical policies is to stand up where it counts: in the states - against the disastrous Biden-Harris policies! _As Governor of Arkansas, I will be the last line of defense against these attacks on our freedom, and I won 't back down. Today, I'm asking you to stand with me by contributing to my campaign: _ **By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:** [**ONE CLICK DONATE: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070043:J2br7MuNZ:m:1:3206719985:3323C40BC2F57DC0DCF16141FCDEA2DD:r) [**ONE CLICK DONATE: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070044:J2br7MuNZ:m:1:3206719985:3323C40BC2F57DC0DCF16141FCDEA2DD:r) [**ONE CLICK DONATE: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070045:J2br7MuNZ:m:1:3206719985:3323C40BC2F57DC0DCF16141FCDEA2DD:r) [**ONE CLICK DONATE: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070046:J2br7MuNZ:m:1:3206719985:3323C40BC2F57DC0DCF16141FCDEA2DD:r) **If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.** You know me - I don't mince words. So here's the truth: Americans deserve better than what the radical Biden-Harris administration has to offer. And the only way we're going to make any progress is to lead in our home states, like I plan to do in Arkansas. _It 's not about doing what is politically correct, or about what's going to impress the Washington elite - it's about doing what's right for our country._ I know we need leaders who will not bow down to pressure or reinforce the status quo. I know we need leaders who will stand up to the radical mob and their allies in the media. _**Let me tell you, Peter, that leader is me. **_ I've been tested under fire, successfully managing one crisis after another in one of the most difficult, high-pressure jobs in all of government. And I'm ready to stand up to the radical Biden-Harris agenda. [**CHIP IN NOW TO SUPPORT SARAH FOR GOVERNOR**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070042:J2br7MuNZ:m:1:3206719985:3323C40BC2F57DC0DCF16141FCDEA2DD:r) _**I believe strongly that we must reject the America LAST Biden agenda and stand strong for American values. **_ I will always:
* Defend your right to be free of socialism and tyranny
* Preserve your Second Amendment right to keep your family safe
* Stand by our police and uphold respect for law and order
* Protect your freedom of speech and religious liberty

As Governor, I will be your voice, and never let them silence you. Because I know it's hard-working Americans like you who make America truly great. I'm always going to stand up for you and keep our country free and prosperous. _And I want you by my side as I do it. _ [**JOIN SARAH NOW: CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070042:J2br7MuNZ:m:1:3206719985:3323C40BC2F57DC0DCF16141FCDEA2DD:r) My dad always said the real test of a leader is not the way you handle the issues you know are coming - it's rising to the moment in a crisis you can never plan for. I can say confidently I learned that lesson while I served President Trump in the White House. I was there at the table with President Trump confronting our most dangerous adversaries like China and North Korea. When we fought and won big fights on tax cuts, securing the border, and conservative judges. We endured relentless threats and attacks through it all. In fact, I was the first White House press secretary to require Secret Service protection because of a credible violent threat against me! **But we never lost focus on the most important thing: getting the job done.** That's exactly what we need to do in every state right now. And I plan to do it myself as Governor. Please, chip in now to support my effort to serve. _**[CHIP IN NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070042:J2br7MuNZ:m:1:3206719985:3323C40BC2F57DC0DCF16141FCDEA2DD:r)**_ Peter, I believe we will succeed in making a better future, but only if we hold the line against the attacks on our freedom and push forward with fresh ideas under a new generation of leadership. **And though my opponents will do everything in their power to destroy me, I will NOT apologize for who I am or who I am fighting for.** **I hope you choose to become a FOUNDING MEMBER of my campaign making an immediate donation now:[https://secure.winred.com/sarah-for-governor/action-2108988/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070042:J2br7MuNZ:m:1:3206719985:3323C40BC2F57DC0DCF16141FCDEA2DD:r)** Thank you for your time, Peter. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070042:J2br7MuNZ:m:1:3206719985:3323C40BC2F57DC0DCF16141FCDEA2DD:r) Sarah Huckabee Sanders |
---
---
For more updates visit our site at [www.conservativedirect.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57070041:J2br7MuNZ:m:1:3206719985:3323C40BC2F57DC0DCF16141FCDEA2DD:r)
---
| |

Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600.

Corporate contributions are not permissible.

Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law.
State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

I need to show strength because Nancy Pelosi, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and the Squad are looking for any sign of weakness. | | | | | | | | | | | | Friends- Wednesday marks the end of my first quarter as an incumbent and shortly I have to publicly disclose how much I have raised for the 2022 election so far. I need to show strength because Nancy Pelosi, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and the Squad are looking for any sign of weakness. | | | | | | | | | | I have been a loud voice against what Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden are doing with their socialist wish list. Liberals like Pelosi and de Blasio don’t like me and they are working together to find someone to run against me. If I am going to continue my fight to lower taxes, support the NYPD and stop AOC and the Squad, I have to raise the resources to fend off a challenger with the full backing of the socialists that want to silence me. I am about $20,000 short as I am writing this email. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Together we can push back on Pelosi, AOC and Biden and stop their assault on our way of life! name: Congresswoman-Elect Julia Letlow
subject: They said it wasn’t possible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is Congresswoman-Elect Julia Letlow and I serve the great state of Louisiana.

Fellow Conservative,

This is Congresswoman-Elect Julia Letlow and I serve the great state of Louisiana. I want you to know the impact that YOUR amazing support had on my race in Louisiana's Special Election last week:

**Thanks to your support:**
* Louisiana elected me as its first Republican woman to serve in Congress -- bringing the total number of GOP women serving in the House to 31.
* Republicans WON this MUST-HOLD seat, giving Nancy Pelosi her smallest majority in YEARS. In fact, only FIVE seats make the difference between Democrat and Republican control of the House.
* I'll be able to fight for conservative values in Congress _instead of doing Nancy Pelosi 's bidding like the Democrats._

They said it wasn't possible. Democrats counted us out from the start. And yet, we prevailed through grassroots support and strong messaging to show voters the truth that we must have more Conservatives in Washington!

**HOWEVER, this is just the beginning.** Our fight to restore a strong Conservative House Majority is not over. I've been told you're a strong conservative, [**which is why I 'm recruiting you to join our team and me in this important fight for our nation's future. **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bKmTeiqhtJ2PgfV-q0N5icxXaFomkvNyoSY3fM4aqJ79Vzc0MEujh3crOvTm5J66hhGu9dhtg6rxwbSS1u6snqHSrVIzhIy1a4CoQJ8_-cH_GTccaBFAZSfxQ4ve-PjIH_2YQ4gFIDDYgMl5opjvJbO3OClZxlSoBtKetmaS70X7Co9_LvGWXbZdMao06Y82Z-5zRoZVMh3TnFv4BQFmbPJ1XzMwvx0cNx8LHb-IYszv4ZiOhDWZrajtarkDx_ZtkunKgspyWKmtq_vdLmEhZOBUFXroHM1Il-croZ3e0O8x8I58OfN6ibqQFCdGdsUKq3Usu5_lfkg9-9O1YMHVQQQDOPN9MkcPQUmgyKGfBL9sol90r8D_bWWuae8zu5b9WsHdOMIKF4CziVCXZvrWvSWCIZ30WCFczUF6tzZakUsJ0q_Vs72YbeGGPtD8-rWe0nuVQXfs2E8=&c=tv4BJisYxLKhOOXkl09lNKxV168ivtLFF18_E4u_uun7WRcEQl46zQ==&ch=oE6jluPs2kiw1QsV4q5-QwfPD9CceM2YX6Z9C21r98nEeVK4oLUVGg==)

[**TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bKmTeiqhtJ2PgfV-q0N5icxXaFomkvNyoSY3fM4aqJ79Vzc0MEujh3crOvTm5J66hhGu9dhtg6rxwbSS1u6snqHSrVIzhIy1a4CoQJ8_-cH_GTccaBFAZSfxQ4ve-PjIH_2YQ4gFIDDYgMl5opjvJbO3OClZxlSoBtKetmaS70X7Co9_LvGWXbZdMao06Y82Z-5zRoZVMh3TnFv4BQFmbPJ1XzMwvx0cNx8LHb-IYszv4ZiOhDWZrajtarkDx_ZtkunKgspyWKmtq_vdLmEhZOBUFXroHM1Il-croZ3e0O8x8I58OfN6ibqQFCdGdsUKq3Usu5_lfkg9-9O1YMHVQQQDOPN9MkcPQUmgyKGfBL9sol90r8D_bWWuae8zu5b9WsHdOMIKF4CziVCXZvrWvSWCIZ30WCFczUF6tzZakUsJ0q_Vs72YbeGGPtD8-rWe0nuVQXfs2E8=&c=tv4BJisYxLKhOOXkl09lNKxV168ivtLFF18_E4u_uun7WRcEQl46zQ==&ch=oE6jluPs2kiw1QsV4q5-QwfPD9CceM2YX6Z9C21r98nEeVK4oLUVGg==)

We need to have the resources to continue to fight for our freedom, which is why for the next 4 hours, [**I 've been authorized to 500% match anything you give today!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bKmTeiqhtJ2PgfV-q0N5icxXaFomkvNyoSY3fM4aqJ79Vzc0MEujh3crOvTm5J66hhGu9dhtg6rxwbSS1u6snqHSrVIzhIy1a4CoQJ8_-cH_GTccaBFAZSfxQ4ve-PjIH_2YQ4gFIDDYgMl5opjvJbO3OClZxlSoBtKetmaS70X7Co9_LvGWXbZdMao06Y82Z-5zRoZVMh3TnFv4BQFmbPJ1XzMwvx0cNx8LHb-IYszv4ZiOhDWZrajtarkDx_ZtkunKgspyWKmtq_vdLmEhZOBUFXroHM1Il-croZ3e0O8x8I58OfN6ibqQFCdGdsUKq3Usu5_lfkg9-9O1YMHVQQQDOPN9MkcPQUmgyKGfBL9sol90r8D_bWWuae8zu5b9WsHdOMIKF4CziVCXZvrWvSWCIZ30WCFczUF6tzZakUsJ0q_Vs72YbeGGPtD8-rWe0nuVQXfs2E8=&c=tv4BJisYxLKhOOXkl09lNKxV168ivtLFF18_E4u_uun7WRcEQl46zQ==&ch=oE6jluPs2kiw1QsV4q5-QwfPD9CceM2YX6Z9C21r98nEeVK4oLUVGg==)

Now is not the time to be complacent. We must take critical action now!

Thank you,

Congresswoman-Elect Julia Letlow LA-5

I want you to know the impact that YOUR amazing support had on my race in Louisiana's Special Election last week: Thanks to your support: Louisiana elected me as its first Republican woman to serve in Congress -- bringing the total number of GOP women serving in the House to 31. Republicans WON this MUST-HOLD seat, giving Nancy Pelosi her smallest majority in YEARS. In fact, only FIVE seats make the difference between Democrat and Republican control of the House. I'll be able to fight for conservative values in Congress instead of doing Nancy Pelosi 's bidding like the Democrats. They said it wasn't possible. Democrats counted us out from the start. And yet, we prevailed through grassroots support and strong messaging to show voters the truth that we must have more Conservatives in Washington! HOWEVER, this is just the beginning. Our fight to restore a strong Conservative House Majority is not over. I've been told you're a strong conservative, == == We need to have the resources to continue to fight for our freedom, which is why for the next 4 hours, == Your support is essential. Can Republican leaders and I count on your support? Now is not the time to be complacent. We must take critical action now! Thank you, Congresswoman-Elect Julia Letlow LA-5 == == Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. == NRCC 320 First St SE Washington, DC 20003 By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from the National Republican Congressional Committee (58606). subject: No one is taking our guns
body:
I believe in personal freedom, citizen rights, and upholding the Constitution of the United States.
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PBtpoy2Y6X0QlzKX0xChwCLBQ3OXpyvEXv44InkEvDVL1uxcJ2hU9NX5gtvjC0JepYAfNocQPt-LFksowxIm14hoJlQifOEjPc66ZVuYYxHccRrt0qxkmjLh3C3W7kVHA7wu6UY946hHKk-UNsxx0a4znrakl0EqtuHwhpfr_AfsJI5GGk25KA==&c=O3ITI1uNRUdBDVfzVifvsTSBUvo29O37VpT1aH_vK5yfGIEb2sTLtQ==&ch=uuezMOdHM4GrH-FhGFdb7Qwm1G5YrbyWznGHUJrJrHmqXU2m2tTDYQ==&jrc=1)

| Friend,
I was proud to join Congress with a record number of Republican women this cycle. Our strong battalion of conservative women are prepared to stand up to the unhinged radical left.
Having freshmen outsiders who are willing to stand strong for the people they represent, instead of agenda-driven Washington insiders, is refreshing and just what America needs.
Kat has been a huge advocate for gun rights and less government - and so am I. As the Representative for Colorado's 3rd Congressional District, I believe in personal freedom, citizen rights, and upholding the Constitution of the United States.
---

| As a strong advocate for gun rights and an entrepreneur, I started my family's restaurant Shooters Grill, where our staff proudly open carries while they serve our customers. We have never been robbed or threatened because we protect our own liberties as the founders intended.
When I come face-to-face with politicians seeking to take our guns and stomp on our constitutional freedoms, I kindly remind them: "Hell no, you won't take our guns."
I'm proud to represent Colorado's 3rd District in Congress, where I get to partner with great Americans like Kat Cammack to stand up against the far-left lunatics in our government. We must preserve our great nation, and ensure our freedoms are protected from the 'woke' mobs seeking to destroy America.
[Will you help me fight for our rights and Drain the Swamp?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PBtpoy2Y6X0QlzKX0xChwCLBQ3OXpyvEXv44InkEvDVL1uxcJ2hU9NX5gtvjC0JepYAfNocQPt-LFksowxIm14hoJlQifOEjPc66ZVuYYxHccRrt0qxkmjLh3C3W7kVHA7wu6UY946hHKk-UNsxx0a4znrakl0EqtuHwhpfr_AfsJI5GGk25KA==&c=O3ITI1uNRUdBDVfzVifvsTSBUvo29O37VpT1aH_vK5yfGIEb2sTLtQ==&ch=uuezMOdHM4GrH-FhGFdb7Qwm1G5YrbyWznGHUJrJrHmqXU2m2tTDYQ==&jrc=1)

body:

Peter,
Our fundraising deadline is quickly approaching, and the challenge has never been greater.

**The Left is coming after me, because they know I pose a real threat.**

Just this week, our great former President Donald Trump said as much. When asked about the future of the Republican Party, **President Trump said,_“I think Josh Hawley has some real courage in going after big-tech. You know, they go after him. Josh is terrific.”_**

I pose a threat to the big businesses that fund the Democratic Party, the big-tech companies that silence conservative voices, and the mainstream media that amplifies democrat talking points.

Many corporations have already “cut ties” with me, refusing future donations, simply because **I stood by my convictions and objected to the certification of the Electoral College results**.

Well, I don’t need their money.
[_**SEND A MESSAGE TO THE BIG CORPORATIONS**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=75f1e4b83fd440d799d39110d6101eb5&_e=_ca7256sYf5D0iJvq6Ab7BdIF5yAl7uT7fdKmOt7cC0QaouZVgefY9WuhvX6qRUokKzCuLfSisM0DUltfH1RRjPpN3Oy7GcIT_ngse4z80Mu_H-nvDVrVEauHNXpm2mWsVjMECCnSTHv6oRZX-XePSFMN0WURRQBPt8tn4irxXCStx5yMKsvbO93cyKUDn88bvh4ad1Qla98BVybW9jCtfgf-I-oXgfpMWJUhnNGvJxlR7CDbkfUoWE805jCBu6AkOvmsPiKGRKcYJUtVnrO9CIew8ci6jvgf-nv1j-CVmXFLaupzZkumi47eNdId-LWkPo1L4C2u6U2mEfQAX7zoDhNsQtW5MwSO9bA6wsauIML2vC9PPqwv01s4GYBD6oVG1t6o32PFxTCuy7mDZhBqw%3D%3D)
**In one week the fundraising quarter ends, and I want to send a message to Washington.**

I want to show them that conservative grassroots donors can outperform those big-tech and big-business PAC contributions that prop up so many of my Democratic colleagues.

**This is why my team is on a mission to raise $10,000 from American patriots who care about law and order in this country, like _YOU_ , before the end of this month.**
[_**DONATE NOW**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=75f1e4b83fd440d799d39110d6101eb5&_e=_ca7256sYf5D0iJvq6Ab7BdIF5yAl7uT7fdKmOt7cC0QaouZVgefY9WuhvX6qRUokKzCuLfSisM0DUltfH1RRjPpN3Oy7GcIT_ngse4z80Mu_H-nvDVrVEauHNXpm2mWsVjMECCnSTHv6oRZX-XePSFMN0WURRQBPt8tn4irxXCStx5yMKsvbO93cyKUDn88Uz0iyrdNAxUpdr61WJn_uamn4JVQlGCW2bIKXu4r4Bg9KqDQDFlUrmjy_GN5oPDgezs3XYuyCqRp3Ux9lTnoZCSmcHIPAYOQL1TCo1mrOLZ_JTPA56sVxGlWzjOCQK5rzuH6AOuVwrDE0Lf46v-SkVHnUoSaJRurc8vU6GzMwZflUYvFv8VRJ5hlPrnzycxK6juEk_QSTtwQvvityzkttw%3D%3D)

Josh Hawley

clean_body: Our fundraising deadline is quickly approaching, and the challenge has never been greater.. | | Peter, Our fundraising deadline is quickly approaching, and the challenge has never been greater. The Left is coming after me, because they know I pose a real threat. Just this week, our great former President Donald Trump said as much. When asked about the future of the Republican Party, President Trump said,“I think Josh Hawley has some real courage in going after big-tech. You know, they go after him. Josh is terrific.” I pose a threat to the big businesses that fund the Democratic Party, the big-tech companies that silence conservative voices, and the mainstream media that amplifies democrat talking points. Many corporations have already “cut ties” with me, refusing future donations, simply because I stood by my convictions and objected to the certification of the Electoral College results. Well, I don’t need their money. In one week the fundraising quarter ends, and I want to send a message to Washington. I want to show them that conservative grassroots donors can outperform those big-tech and big-business PAC contributions that prop up so many of my Democratic colleagues. This is why my team is on a mission to raise $10,000 from American patriots who care about law and order in this country, like YOU , before the end of this month. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

name: Congresswoman-Elect Julia Letlow
subject: They said it wasn't possible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Don't want to receive anymore emails? [Unsubscribe](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9309670/224717773/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTkzMDk2NzA%3d&x=c9d0e83d)

This is Congresswoman-Elect Julia Letlow and I serve the great state of Louisiana.

Fellow Conservative,

This is Congresswoman-Elect Julia Letlow and I serve the great state of Louisiana. I want you to know the impact that YOUR amazing support had on my race in Louisiana's Special Election last week:

**Thanks to your support:**
* Louisiana elected me as its first Republican woman to serve in Congress -- bringing the total number of GOP women serving in the House to 31.
* Republicans WON this MUST-HOLD seat, giving Nancy Pelosi her smallest majority in YEARS. In fact, only FIVE seats make the difference between Democrat and Republican control of the House.
* I'll be able to fight for conservative values in Congress _instead of doing Nancy Pelosi's bidding like the Democrats._

They said it wasn't possible. Democrats counted us out from the start. And yet, we prevailed through grassroots support and strong messaging to show voters the truth that we must have more Conservatives in Washington!

**HOWEVER, this is just the beginning.** Our fight to restore a strong Conservative House Majority is not over. I've been told you're a strong conservative, [**which is why I'm recruiting you to join our team and me in this important fight for our nation's future. **](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9309670/224717773/196701/2/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=fcc08fb5)

[**TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9309670/224717773/196701/3/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=5c7f532d)

We need to have the resources to continue to fight for our freedom, which is why for the next 4 hours, [**I've been authorized to 500% match anything you give today!**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9309670/224717773/196701/4/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=f88cef59)

Your support is essential. Can Republican leaders and I count on your support?

Now is not the time to be complacent. We must take critical action now!

Thank you,

Congresswoman-Elect Julia Letlow LA-5
[](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9309670/224717773/196702/5/)

[**TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9309670/224717773/196701/6/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=2535f8e6)

body:

This includes protecting America’s borders to stop criminals from entering our country illegally.

Joe Biden and liberals in Congress blown the gates on our southern border **WIDE OPEN** with their reckless policies. This has created a major humanitarian crisis at the border, _**IN THE MIDST OF A GLOBAL PANDEMIC**_ , and it puts American lives at risk!
