name: Elisa Cardnell
subject: Big News!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Grassroots PAC
body:
electgrassroots.org [electgrassroots.org]Big news!
Announcing Elect Grassroots PAC
Supporting working class candidates and fighting to end anti-democratic aspects of our political system.
Hi Peter,
I'm excited to announce the launch of Elect Grassroots PAC. Millionaires are overrepresented in Congress, and it's time to elect leaders who know what it's like when policies meet reality in living rooms and checkbooks around the country. Together, we have the power to pool our time, talent, and treasure to create real change in our political system and elect people who work for us, not corporations. [secure.actblue.com/donate/joingrassroots?refcode=email1]
Elect Grassroots PAC supports candidates who will champion policies to help the working class and to end anti-democratic practices in our system. Before I ran for Congress, I was a teacher and a Navy veteran. My campaign built a grassroots movement of over 5000 contributions and received more votes than any previous Democratic primary candidate in my district. I know that when we all chip in just a little, it adds up quickly to make a real movement.
That's why Elect Grassroots is building a national movement of working class people. When we work together, we have the capability to change our system to work for all of us. Please consider becoming a sustaining supporter for as little as $5 per month. I know that especially after the last year, budgets are tight, so don't worry if you can't chip in right now.
Become a supporter today [secure.actblue.com/donate/joingrassroots?refcode=email1]Thanks for all you do,
Elisa Cardnell
Founder/Executive Director
Make a one-time donation [secure.actblue.com/donate/electgrassroots?refcode=email1f]https://www.facebook.com/electgrassroots [https://www.facebook.com/electgrassroots] https://twitter.com/electgrassroots [https://twitter.com/electgrassroots]
Paid for by Elect Grassroots PAC
Elect Grassroots PAC
PO Box 667253
Houston, TX 77266
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/270cbfcb-a190-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992/05534c31-e990-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NjkzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1NTM0YzMxLWU5OTAtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SVuECFvTOdI6CG6KtiOPGqpUdHT5avPJWjdClEQUIH8=&id=107813121 .

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Statement on Supreme Court Refusal to Uphold Court Ruling Requiring Hillary Clinton Email Testimony
body:
Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton issued the following statement in response to the United States Supreme Court’s refusal to grant cert to Judicial Watch’s challenge to an appeals court decision exempting Hillary Clinton from testifying under oath about her emails and Benghazi attack documents.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Mar 29, 2021
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53278&L=22496&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvaHJjLXNjb3R1cy1yZWZ1c2FsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMjkxOTU2NDI=) | **[Judicial Watch Statement on Supreme Court Refusal to Uphold Court Ruling Requiring Hillary Clinton Email Testimony](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53278&L=22496&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvaHJjLXNjb3R1cy1yZWZ1c2FsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMjkxOTU2NDI=)** Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton issued the following statement in response to the United States Supreme Court’s refusal to grant cert to Judicial Watch’s challenge to an appeals court decision exempting Hillary Clinton from testifying under oath about her emails and Benghazi attack documents. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53278&L=22496&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvaHJjLXNjb3R1cy1yZWZ1c2FsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMjkxOTU2NDI=)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53278&L=22497&F=H&) | **[Biden Administration Gives Media “Zero Access” to Mexican Border Crisis](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53278&L=22497&F=H&)** The Biden administration is restricting media access to the Mexican border crisis, according to various news outlets and journalists, but Border Patrol sectors in the region are reporting alarming numbers of illegal immigrants crossing into the U.S. from Mexico. The unprecedented onslaught is overwhelming federal agents, and several Border Patrol sectors are publishing distressing figures as the situation escalates. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53278&L=22497&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53278&L=22484&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvb3BtLXJlY29yZHMtY2hpbmEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMyOTE5NTY0Mg==) | **[Judicial Watch Sues OPM for Records on Agency Personnel Classes, Seminars in China; Breach of OPM Data](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53278&L=22484&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvb3BtLXJlY29yZHMtY2hpbmEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMyOTE5NTY0Mg==)** The OPM revealed in June 2015 that it was the target of a “cyber intrusion” in which the personnel records of 22.1 million people were compromised. The OPM was targeted in two linked attacks, the first in March 2014 and the second in May 2014. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53278&L=22484&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvb3BtLXJlY29yZHMtY2hpbmEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMyOTE5NTY0Mg==)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53278&L=22450&F=H&) | **[Public University, Pharmacy Apologize for Denying Illegal Immigrants U.S.-Funded COVID-19 Vaccine](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53278&L=22450&F=H&)** While frustrated Americans across the country struggle to get their government-funded COVID-19 vaccine, a national drug store chain is apologizing for mistakenly denying illegal immigrants the shot. The pharmacy retail giant, Rite Aid, reportedly turned away two women at separate stores in southern California. In one of the cases, the illegal immigrant provided a foreign identification card that is not valid in the U.S. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53278&L=22450&F=H&)
---|---
|
---
| |
---
### [FARRELL: A Reckoning For COVID Bungling Is Overdue ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53278&L=22335&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZmFycmVsbC1jb3ZpZC1idW5nbGluZy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzI5MTk1NjQy) The Daily Caller One such overdue reckoning is coming for New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, who seemingly caused thousands of needless deaths by shipping infected elderly people to nursing homes, placing the most dangerous among the most vulnerable. His administration then covered up the number of deaths it caused, recently justifying the move on the grounds that the truth would have been politically inconvenient. The governor who received an Emmy award for his “masterful” televised coronavirus briefings is now facing an FBI investigation and calls to resign. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53278&L=22335&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZmFycmVsbC1jb3ZpZC1idW5nbGluZy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzI5MTk1NjQy)
---
### [Pelosi-Milley Phone Call About ‘Unhinged’ Trump is Target of Judicial Watch Lawsuit ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53278&L=22498&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvcGVsb3NpLW1pbGxleS1waG9uZS1jYWxsLWFib3V0LXVuaGluZ2VkLXRydW1wLWlzLXRhcmdldC1vZi1qdWRpY2lhbC13YXRjaC1sYXdzdWl0P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMyOTE5NTY0Mg==) Fox News In a statement, Tom Fitton, president of Judicial Watch, said that if Pelosi’s description of her conversation with Milley is accurate, their discussion "sets a dangerous precedent that could undermine the president’s role as commander in chief and the separation of powers." [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53278&L=22498&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvcGVsb3NpLW1pbGxleS1waG9uZS1jYWxsLWFib3V0LXVuaGluZ2VkLXRydW1wLWlzLXRhcmdldC1vZi1qdWRpY2lhbC13YXRjaC1sYXdzdWl0P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMyOTE5NTY0Mg==)
---
### [How H.R.1 intends to overturn Supreme Court rulings on elections ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53278&L=22451&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvaHIxLXNjb3R1cy1ydWxpbmdzLWVsZWN0aW9ucy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzI5MTk1NjQy) The Hill Ever since House Resolution 1, the Democrats’ 886-page partisan wish list of a voting bill, passed the House on a party-line vote earlier this month, its critics have had a lot to say. They correctly point out that the bill federalizes election law on a historically unprecedented scale, systematically impairs existing federal and state laws concerning election integrity, and imposes new burdens and restrictions on political speech and activity. All of this is apparent from the text of the bill. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53278&L=22451&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvaHIxLXNjb3R1cy1ydWxpbmdzLWVsZWN0aW9ucy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzI5MTk1NjQy)

clean_body: Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton issued the following statement in response to the United States Supreme Court’s refusal to grant cert to Judicial Watch’s challenge to an appeals court decision exempting Hillary Clinton from testifying under oath about her emails and Benghazi attack documents. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Mar 29, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | = | = Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton issued the following statement in response to the United States Supreme Court’s refusal to grant cert to Judicial Watch’s challenge to an appeals court decision exempting Hillary Clinton from testifying under oath about her emails and Benghazi attack documents. = ---|--- | | | | | The Biden administration is restricting media access to the Mexican border crisis, according to various news outlets and journalists, but Border Patrol sectors in the region are reporting alarming numbers of illegal immigrants crossing into the U.S. from Mexico. The unprecedented onslaught is overwhelming federal agents, and several Border Patrol sectors are publishing distressing figures as the situation escalates. ---|--- | | | | == | == The OPM revealed in June 2015 that it was the target of a “cyber intrusion” in which the personnel records of 22.1 million people were compromised. The OPM was targeted in two linked attacks, the first in March 2014 and the second in May 2014. == ---|--- | | | | = | = While frustrated Americans across the country struggle to get their government-funded COVID-19 vaccine, a national drug store chain is apologizing for mistakenly denying illegal immigrants the shot. The pharmacy retail giant, Rite Aid, reportedly turned away two women at separate stores in southern California. In one of the cases, the illegal immigrant provided a foreign identification card that is not valid in the U.S. = ---|--- | | | The Daily Caller One such overdue reckoning is coming for New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, who seemingly caused thousands of needless deaths by shipping infected elderly people to nursing homes, placing the most dangerous among the most vulnerable. His administration then covered up the number of deaths it caused, recently justifying the move on the grounds that the truth would have been politically inconvenient. The governor who received an Emmy award for his “masterful” televised coronavirus briefings is now facing an FBI investigation and calls to resign. == Fox News In a statement, Tom Fitton, president of Judicial Watch, said that if Pelosi’s description of her conversation with Milley is accurate, their discussion "sets a dangerous precedent that could undermine the president’s role as commander in chief and the separation of powers." == The Hill Ever since House Resolution 1, the Democrats’ 886-page partisan wish list of a voting bill, passed the House on a party-line vote earlier this month, its critics have had a lot to say. They correctly point out that the bill federalizes election law on a historically unprecedented scale, systematically impairs existing federal and state laws concerning election integrity, and imposes new burdens and restrictions on political speech and activity. All of this is apparent from the text of the bill. = = = = == == | CLIPS = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

name: Giffords.org
subject: First → Then → Now
body:
#

Friends, we have a few important updates to share ahead of our fundraising deadline tomorrow. Do you have a minute?
Earlier this month, universal background checks passed in the House. Every day since we've been working tirelessly to get this lifesaving policy a debate and vote in the Senate.
And this morning, Gabby reached out to you personally about why it's crucial that the Senate passes universal background checks as soon as possible.
So now, we're reaching out to ask if you can chip in to help us meet our 25,000 contribution FEC fundraising goal. Getting there will allow us to push the Senate to pass universal background checks and put the bill on President Biden's desk.
So what do you say?
[**Will you make a $3 donation to Giffords PAC today? We 'll take that contribution and put it right to work passing the lifesaving bipartisan background checks bill that will be voted on in the Senate.**](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee114/78fba3aa/6237d9f6/50aad671/379415869/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMjktMi1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?refcode=em210329-2-a")
If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:
| [Donate $10](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee114/78fba3aa/6237d9f6/50aad672/379415869/VEsHAQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMjktMi1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em210329-2-a") | [Donate $25](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee114/78fba3aa/6237d9f6/50aad675/379415869/VEsHAA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMjktMi1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210329-2-a")
---|---
[Donate $50](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee114/78fba3aa/6237d9f6/50aad674/379415869/VEsHAw/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMjktMi1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210329-2-a") | [Donate $100](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee114/78fba3aa/6237d9f6/50aad677/379415869/VEsHAg/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMjktMi1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210329-2-a")
---|---
[Donate $250](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee114/78fba3aa/6237d9f6/50aad676/379415869/VEsHDQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMjktMi1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210329-2-a") | [Other amount](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee114/78fba3aa/6237d9f6/50aad673/379415869/VEsHDA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMjktMi1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210329-2-a")
---|---
We can't waste any more time. This past month, tragedy yet again captured the nation's attention not once, but twice. 8 people were killed--six of them Asian women--in attacks in the Atlanta area. Then just 6 days later, 10 people were shot and killed, including a police officer, in a horrific mass shooting at a grocery store in Boulder, Colorado.
Shootings like this can be prevented with gun safety legislation starting with universal background checks. We can save lives, we just need the Senate to act.
Now is our chance. Life is starting to return back to normal, which means we need to do everything we can to act now and prevent another tragedy from taking place.
Thank you so much for all of your support,
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee114/78fba3aa/6237d9f6/50aad671/379415869/VEsEBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMjktMi1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?refcode=em210329-2-a")**

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee114/78fba3aa/6237d9f6/50aad649/379415869/VEsEBA/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

Today, we've got to stand up for them._ **_Peter, you know no one will fight harder for the good name of our police than me. clean_body: The stakes are higher than ever. Let me tell you why... Peter, I know my team reached out to you before the weekend, and I just wanted to check in with an important message. We’re now a couple of days out from the end of the quarter on March 31st – and I need your help to meet this critical deadline. Peter, the stakes are higher than ever. Let me tell you why: Talk of defunding the police hasn't calmed down. Crime is rising in our streets. Decades of police efforts to lower crime rates are being undone by radical policies in a matter of months. All while the Biden Administration is taking away more tax money from our red areas like Long Island to prop up cities and states whose agendas are anti-police and often pro-criminal! We must send a message that this is unacceptable. Our police are walking the streets every day, putting their lives in danger to defend us. Today, we've got to stand up for them. Peter, you know no one will fight harder for the good name of our police than me. It's why I was endorsed by every New York City police union last year. name: Cooper Teboe
subject: Let’s make sure we have the resources to keep fighting for progressive change in this country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
We may not be in the middle of an election cycle, it’s essential we keep funding our organizing and messaging efforts.
#
Our country continues to face urgent challenges daily. But I believe in the power of our grassroots movement to address these challenges.
Relief efforts to keep working families afloat through the COVID-19 crisis won’t happen unless we keep pushing for them. Meanwhile, our democracy is under attack – Republicans just enacted voter suppression laws in Georgia and Missouri, and we need Congress to act quickly to pass the For the People Act and protect voting rights nationwide.
So while we may not be in the middle of an election cycle, we’re moving full-steam ahead with our ongoing organizing and messaging efforts. Here’s what we need to do to fuel that work:
**If we raise $20,000 before our big quarterly fundraising deadline on Wednesday, we’ll have the resources to keep up our fights for policies like Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, survival checks and so much more.**
